abstractMirror.name: Abstract Mirror
abstractMirror.text: {trigger:cast} Choose a subtype. Target unit in play becomes the chosen subtype.

abyssalMaw.name: Abyssal Maw
abyssalMaw.text: {trigger:end} Attack a front row card an opponent controls or deal 2 damage to an opponent that controls no front row cards.

artisticGolem.name: Artistic Golem
artisticGolem.text: {trigger:enter} Create a Pillar {force:2}/{key:Delayed, Muted, Warden} Token if able.

autoShield.name: Auto-Shield
autoShield.text: Effected card gains {key:immortal} during your turns.

avidCollector.name: Avid Collector
avidCollector.text: {trigger:cast} Sacrifice any number of tokens you control: draw cards equal to the number of tokens sacrificed.

banishWatcher.name: Banish Watcher
banishWatcher.text: When a card enters your void target unit you control gains {force:1}.

barrierLord.name: Barrier Lord
barrierLord.text: Does not deal combat damage. If a card you control were to take damage, Barrier Lord takes the damage instead.

beehmothStinger.name: Beehmoth Stinger
beehmothStinger.text: Effected card gains {force:1}. Gain {force:2} instead if the effected card is a bug.

blackenedMaggot.name: Blackened Maggot
blackenedMaggot.text: If Blackened Fly enters the discard, deal 1 damage to each opponent (max 3 times per turn).

bloodRage.name: Blood Rage
bloodRage.text: {trigger:cast} Target active unit you control becomes inactive and deals damage equal to their {force:?} to a target card then loses {force:2}.

bloodRock.name: Blood Rock
bloodRock.text: Units you control with {key:bleed} deal 1 extra combat damage to the opponent.

bloodsong.name: Bloodsong
bloodsong.text: {trigger:cast} Choose a number from 1-5: Deal damage equal to the number chosen to all cards in play.

blueImp.name: Blue Imp
blueImp.text: {trigger:breach} Target player discards cards from the top of their deck up to the damage dealt (you choose the amount discarded). You may move Blue Imp to an open back zone.

boil.name: Boil
boil.text: {trigger:cast} Target unit and any adjacent units take 1 damage.

boilBeast.name: Boil Beast
boilBeast.text: Whenever an instance of sick damage occurs, draw a card.

borderOfLife.name: Border of Life
borderOfLife.text: Effected card is {key:immortal} and {key:safe}. If the effected card perishes, you may attach Border of Life to another card you control. If you do not contol any cards, void Border of Life.

bottomDweller.name: Bottom Dweller
bottomDweller.text: {trigger:enter} Discard up to 2 cards from your hand.

bountifulHarvest.name: Bountiful Harvest
bountifulHarvest.text: If a card you control/play requires a non-specific sacrifice, you may instead lose {force:1} from Bountiful Harvest to pay for the sacrifice.

carve.name: Carve
carve.text: {trigger:cast} Target card takes 2 damage and gains {key:bleed}.

cauldronOfChaos.name: Cauldron Of Chaos
cauldronOfChaos.text: You can only use {skill:Chaotic Brew} if you have at least 10 cards in your discard.

chrysalis.name: Chrysalis
chrysalis.text: {trigger:end} You may add an attached card to your hand.

churn.name: Churn
churn.text: {trigger:cast} Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. You may add up to 3 cards of different types to your hand. You cannot play them this turn. Void the remaining cards.

cicada.name: Cicada
cicada.text: If Cicada enters your discard, give {force:2} to a card you control until the end of the turn.

cleaver.name: Cleaver
cleaver.text: Units you control have {key:bleed} during your turns.

cloneElement.name: Clone Element
cloneElement.text:
Clone Element has {key:Quick} when attacking.
{trigger:victor} Gain {force:2}.

combatIdol.name: Combat Idol
combatIdol.text: While Combat Idol is in play, the effect of {key:muted} is nullified.

comingOfMarlita.name: Coming of Marlita
comingOfMarlita.text: {trigger:cast} Draw a card. If you control a Marlita, draw an additional card.

corpseBeetle.name: Corpse Beetle
corpseBeetle.text: When Corpse Beetle enters your discard you may sacrifice a card you control.

creationFromNothing.name: Creation From Nothing
creationFromNothing.text: When a card enters your void, you gain 1 LVL.

crow'sNest.name: Crow's Nest
crow'sNest.text: When a Crow unit perishes, draw a card.

crowAlchemy.name: Crow Alchemy
crowAlchemy.text: {trigger:cast} Sacrifice a card you control: create up to 2 Crow {force:1} tokens.

crowDevourer.name: Crow Devourer
crowDevourer.text: {trigger:enter} Attach all Crow cards in play to Crow Devourer.

crusherGolem.name: Crusher Golem
crusherGolem.text: Crusher Golem deals damage equal to half of the opposing card's base {force:?}, rounded up.

deathPact.name: Death Pact
deathPact.text: When a card you control perishes on your turn, deal 1 damage to target player {max 3 per turn.}

deeperUntilTheEnd.name: Deeper Until The End
deeperUntilTheEnd.text:
{trigger:cast} Discard cards from the top of your deck up to the number of cards you control, then void Deeper Until the End. 
{trigger:begin} If Deeper Until the End is in your void: discard a card: return Deeper Until the End to your hand.

dissolve.name: Dissolve
dissolve.text: {cost:As an additional cost, discard a card from your hand.}

doctor.name: Doctor
doctor.text: Doctor does not take sick damage.

doomChain.name: Doom Chain
doomChain.text: Any unit that opposes a Monster has {key:doom}.

doomsdayBarrel.name: Doomsday Barrel
doomsdayBarrel.text: {trigger:cast} Remove 4 nuclear counters from Doomsday Barrel: Deal 4 damage to any target.

doorToNowhere.name: Door to Nowhere
doorToNowhere.text: When a non-token unit you control perishes, you may choose to send it to your discard, deck, void, or hand. If you return it to your hand, you cannot play it until you end a turn.

drillMaster.name: Drill Master
drillMaster.text: Drill Master always destroys Icons in combat.

dustPixie.name: Dust Pixie
dustPixie.text: {trigger:enter} Add a soul counter to this card.

dyingStar.name: Dying Star
dyingStar.text:
{trigger:cast} Void Dying Star.
{trigger:begin} If Dying Star is in your void, deal 1 damage to any target.

ectoplasm.name: Ectoplasm
ectoplasm.text: When a non-token unit you control perishes, you may send a card from your deck to the discard.

elderSpell.name: Elder Spell
elderSpell.text: {trigger:cast} Return all spells to their owner's hands. All cards in play take damage equal to half of their {force:?}, rounded down. All players draw a card.

emptyMan.name: Empty Man
emptyMan.text: {cost:As an additional cost, sacrifice 3 cards you control. Cannot be played in the back row.}

etherealWitch.name: Ethereal Witch
etherealWitch.text: When you cast your first 2 cards in a turn, draw a card.

evilEgg.name: Evil Egg
evilEgg.text: {trigger:perish} Search your deck for a unit. Reveal it, then add it to your hand. You cannot play it this turn.

falseGolem.name: False Golem
falseGolem.text: {trigger:enter} Void a unit in your discard. False Golem gains the text and {force:?} of the voided unit (any {trigger:enter} effects retrigger). If there are no applicable cards, False Golem becomes {force:0}.

falsePower.name: False Power
falsePower.text: Effected card's {force:?} is equal to the {force:?} of the card they currently oppose. If there is no opposing card, they are {force:0}.

falseQueen'sCarcass.name: False Queen's Carcass
falseQueen'sCarcass.text: Non-Bug units have {key:fragile} while False Queen's Carcass is in play.

fleshboundRitual.name: Fleshbound Ritual
fleshboundRitual.text: {trigger:perish} Set a unit from your discard except its LVL is 1.

flock.name: Flock
flock.text: {trigger:cast} Create up to 2 Crow {force:1} tokens and draw a card.

flowerWrangler.name: Flower Wrangler
flowerWrangler.text: {trigger:enter} Target card your opponent controls gains {key:Static} and {key:sick}.

flyingCube.name: Flying Cube
flyingCube.text: Gain {force:1} when a unit is played in your back row.

fractalBlade.name: Fractal Blade
fractalBlade.text: {cost:Can only be attached to a front row card. Can only be played once a turn.}

frogTrophy.name: Frog Trophy
frogTrophy.text: Does not deal damage when attacked. When Frog Trophy moves, target card gains {key:fragile} until Frog Trophy perishes.

gargoyle.name: Gargoyle
gargoyle.text: {trigger:breach} Target front row unit your opponent controls gains {key:fragile} until Gargoyle perishes.

ghostGathering.name: Ghost Gathering
ghostGathering.text: {trigger:cast} Create Ghost {force:1}/{key:bleed} tokens up to the amount of Units in your discard.

godlessVessel.name: Godless Vessel
godlessVessel.text: {cost:As an additional cost, sacrifice 2 cards you control. Must be played in the center zone.}

graveDigger.name: Grave Digger
graveDigger.text: {trigger:cast} Shuffle your discard pile, then draw up to 2 cards from it.

greenImp.name: Green Imp
greenImp.text: {trigger:breach} Target card you control gains {force:?} equal to the damage dealt. You may move Green Imp to an open back zone.

helpfulHoneyBee.name: Helpful Honey bee
helpfulHoneyBee.text: When Helpful Honey Bee enters the discard, draw 2 cards.

hematem.name: Hematem
hematem.text: {trigger:enter} Gain {force:1} for ever other monster card you control.

hexagonalVision.name: Hexagonal Vision
hexagonalVision.text: {trigger:cast} Search your deck for a LVL 1 unit. Reveal it, then add it to your hand.

hiveInfiltrator.name: Hive Infiltrator
hiveInfiltrator.text: {cost:As an additional cost, sacrifice a card you control.}

holyPulse.name: Holy Pulse
holyPulse.text: {trigger:cast} Draw cards equal to the number of immortal cards you control.

homunculus.name: Homunculus
homunculus.text: When you draw a card, add a matter counter to Homunculus.

horrorFromAbove.name: Horror From Above
horrorFromAbove.text: Horror From Above's {force:?} is equal to the number of times you've played it this turn times 2.

infection:misdirection.name: Infection:Misdirection
infection:misdirection.text: When a card you control takes sick damage: target card an opponent controls takes the damage instead.

itGetsWorse.name: It Gets Worse
itGetsWorse.text: {trigger:cast} Up to 3 target units gain {key:sick}. If 3 cards were targetted by It Gets Worse, draw a card.

jackInTheBox.name: Jack in the Box
jackInTheBox.text: {trigger:begin} Sacrifice Jack In the Box, then set any attached units.

jester.name: Jester
jester.text:
If jester were to enter your discard, you may setit. If Jester is set this way, deal 1 damage to all opponents.
{trigger:perish} Shuffle Jester into your deck.

kickTheHive.name: Kick The Hive
kickTheHive.text: {trigger:cast} Sacrifice a Bug you control: set a unit from your hand. If the set unit's LVL is greater than 3, its {key:delayed}.

killerBee.name: Killer Bee
killerBee.text: {cost:As an additional cost, set your life to 1.}

landterra.name: Landterra
landterra.text: {trigger:enter} Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Then recycle your deck with those 3 cards. When you play any of those 3 cards, add a Gold Leaf counter to Landterra. If Landterra has 3 Gold Leaf counters on it, cards you control have {key:immortal}.

lastChance.name: Last Chance
lastChance.text: You cannot lose the game due to your life being 0 or less.

lastMass.name: Last Mass
lastMass.text: Gain {force:1} when a card enters your discard.

lastWish.name: Last Wish
lastWish.text: {trigger:enter} All players choose a card they control. Sacrifice any card not chosen. For the remaining cards, set their LVL to 1, then set both player's LVL to 1. Neither player can attack until the start of your next turn.

lifePool.name: Life Pool
lifePool.text: Whenever you take player damage, draw a card.

livingHome.name: Living Home
livingHome.text: Draw a card when an icon enters your control.

locust.name: Locust
locust.text: Locust has {key:Quick} when attacking. Every time a card gains {key:sick},  this card gains {force:1}.

madnessPolicy.name: Madness Policy
madnessPolicy.text: {trigger:enter} Any card that opposes another card is sacrificed. Add a soul counter to Madness Policy for every card sacrificed.

marlitaBlack.name: Marlita Black
marlitaBlack.text: Whenever Marlita Black declares an attack, choose a player. That player discards cards from the top of their deck or hand up to Marlita Black's {force:?}.

marlitaBlue.name: Marlita Blue
marlitaBlue.text: When a front row card you control perishes, you may discard the top 5 cards of your deck (must be able to discard 5). If you do, return the card that perished to your hand. You cannot play it this turn.

marlitaGray.name: Marlita Gray
marlitaGray.text: {cost:Can only be played once per turn.}

marlitaRed.name: Marlita Red
marlitaRed.text:
{trigger:enter} Discard a card from your hand.
{trigger:begin} Units you control gain {force:1}.

marlitaRedToBlue.name: Marlita Red to Blue
marlitaRedToBlue.text: {cost:As an additional cost, sacrifice at least 1 Marlita card you control.} For each card sacrificed as part of Marlita Red to Blue's cost, gain {force:3} until the end of the turn.

marlitaTeal.name: Marlita Teal
marlitaTeal.text:
When a non-token unit you control perishes, give {force:1} to a card you control until the end of the turn.
{trigger:enter} Discard the top 3 cards of your deck.

marlitaYellow.name: Marlita Yellow
marlitaYellow.text: {trigger:breach} The opponent breached discards cards from the top of their deck equal to Marlita Yellow's {force:?}

melt.name: Melt
melt.text: {trigger:cast} Discard your hand. Draw an additional card during your next 2 draw phases.

mercuryPool.name: Mercury Pool
mercuryPool.text: Other cards you control have +{force:?} equal to the number of soul counters on Mercury Pool.

messageFromMars.name: Message From Mars
messageFromMars.text: {trigger:cast} Reveal the top 5 cards of your deck and choose up to 3 of them. For each card chosen, void a card from your hand. Discard remaining revealed cards.

mimic.name: Mimic
mimic.text: {trigger:perish} The player who destroyed this card draws 2 cards.

miracleMachine.name: Miracle Machine
miracleMachine.text: If a unit you control were to perish, you may void a card from your hand: return the unit to your hand instead. If you do, gain 2 matter counters.

mogOfTheBog.name: Mog of The Bog
mogOfTheBog.text: Mog of the Bog gains {force:2} instead of taking sick damage.

monolith.name: Monolith
monolith.text: Monolith can only attack if the opponent controls no back row cards. Whenever you draw a card gain {force:1}.

moonAngel.name: Moon Angel
moonAngel.text: When a unit perishes, add a soul counter to Moon Angel.

mortalityAgent.name: Mortality Agent
mortalityAgent.text: {trigger:cast} Both players reveal the top card of their deck and add it to their hand. If you draw a Ghost card, you may draw an additional card.

nullAndCreation.name: Null and Creation
nullAndCreation.text: {trigger:cast} All cards your opponents control gain {key:doom} until the end of the turn. For every card affected, add {force:1} to a card you control.

nyx.name: Nyx
nyx.text: {cost:As an additional cost, sacrifice a card you control.}

onyxDefender.name: Onyx Defender
onyxDefender.text: {cost:Must be played in the left zone.} Cards you control in the center zone have +{force:1}.

ouroboros.name: Ouroboros
ouroboros.text: {cost:As an additional cost, you must control at least 3 cards.} Whenever a non-token card you control perishes except Ouroboros, you may void a card from your hand and return it to play.

paleMask.name: Pale Mask
paleMask.text: When a unit you control perishes, you may create a Ghost {force:1}/{key:bleed} token.

pearlAggressor.name: Pearl Aggressor
pearlAggressor.text: {cost:Must be played in the right zone.} Cards you control in the center zone get +{force:2}.

pebble.name: Pebble
pebble.text: Cards adjacent to Pebble are 1 LVL higher while Pebble is in play.

phaseBeast.name: Phase Beast
phaseBeast.text: If Phase Beast were to take damage, you may discard a card from your hand to ignore the damage dealt and take 1 damage instead. Phase Beast becomes inactive.

pheromoneDen.name: Pheromone Den
pheromoneDen.text: Units you control that are LVL 2 or less have +{force:2}.

pinCushion.name: Pin Cushion
pinCushion.text:
Whenever you take non-combat damage, deal damage to an opponent equal to the damage taken.
{trigger:cast} Deal 1 damage to a front row unit in play.

pixie.name: Pixie
pixie.text: Other Magic cards you control have +{force:1}.

powder.name: Powder
powder.text: {trigger:cast} Can only be cast during the opponent's turn: all front row cards gain {key:fragile} until the end of the turn.

prophecyOfPlague.name: Prophecy of Plague
prophecyOfPlague.text:
All units enter with {key:sick}.
{trigger:perish} Destroy all {key:sick} cards in play.
{trigger:cast} Destroy a {key:sick} card in play.

puelPurifico.name: Puel Purifico
puelPurifico.text: {cost: As an additionl cost, sacrifice 2 cards you control.}

queenBeeBwyndolyn.name: Queen Bee Bwyndolyn
queenBeeBwyndolyn.text: {cost:As an additional cost, sacrifice 2 cards you control.}

quickPlay.name: Quick Play
quickPlay.text: You may play Units at {key:instant} speed.

radiantLarva.name: Radiant Larva
radiantLarva.text: You may cast Radiant Larva if it enters the discard without perishing.

raster.name: Raster
raster.text: {trigger:cast} Choose a front row card you control and a front row card an opponent controls. Destroy both. Target frontline card you control becomes gains {force:?} equal to the total {force:?} among the cards and is {key:muted} until the end of the turn.

rasterBeast.name: Raster Beast
rasterBeast.text: Whenever Raster Beast loses {force:?}, you may distribute the lost {force:?} among other cards you control in any way you want.

ratMother.name: Rat Mother
ratMother.text: {trigger:enter} Choose 2 players. Fill open zones of those players with Rat {force:1}/{key:sick} tokens.

reapTheDead.name: Reap The Dead
reapTheDead.text: {trigger:cast} Set a unit from your discard, then take damage equal to it's LVL.

reaper.name: Reaper
reaper.text: Front row cards your opponent controls have {key:Doom} while Reaper is in play. When a card enters your opponent's void, Reaper becomes {force:3} until the end of the turn.

redImp.name: Red Imp
redImp.text: {trigger:breach} You gain LVL equal to the damage dealt. You may move Red Imp to an open back zone.

redZone.name: Red Zone
redZone.text: {trigger:enter} Attach a card an opponent controls to Red Zone.

repented.name: Repented
repented.text: When Repented deals damage, deal 1 damage to all front row cards your opponent controls.

ringGenerator.name: Ring Generator
ringGenerator.text: When a card enters your void, target unit you control gains {force:1}.

rockThrow.name: Rock Throw
rockThrow.text:
When a Golem enters your discard, target unit you control gains {force:1}.
{trigger:cast} You may discard any number of Golems in your hand or void any number of Golems in your discard. For each card discarded/voided this way, deal 3 damage to a target card or draw a card.

roller.name: Roller
roller.text: When Roller enters your front row, deal 1 damage to the opposing card. If Roller enters the discard you may move your cards.

s.name: s
s.text: {trigger:cast} Target unit LVL 3 or less becomes a Fish {force:0}/{key:static} token.

sacrificialKnife.name: Sacrificial Knife
sacrificialKnife.text:
Draw a card whenever an opponent sacrifices a card.
{trigger:cast} Destroy target card. The owner of the card draws a card.

sandCube.name: Sand Cube
sandCube.text: {trigger:perish} If Sand Cube moved to block a unit, the blocked unit gins {key:fragile}.

serendipity.name: Serendipity
serendipity.text:
If Serendipity is in the back row, gain {force:1} when a card enters your discard.
{trigger:end} If Serendipity is in the front row, lose {force:2}.

shadowPrince.name: Shadow Prince
shadowPrince.text: {cost:As an additional cost, sacrifice 2 cards you control.}

shatter.name: Shatter
shatter.text: {trigger:cast} Target card is now {force:0} (does not cause the card to perish). Draw a card.

shelledFiend.name: Shelled Fiend
shelledFiend.text: If Shelled Fiend enters the discard, give {key:immortal} to a unit you control until the start of your next turn.

shinyCrow.name: Shiny Crow
shinyCrow.text: When a Crow enters your control, deal 1 damage to a target card your opponent controls.

shrineOfMarlita.name: Shrine of Marlita
shrineOfMarlita.text: Cards you control are Marlitas in addition to their other types.

skeleton.name: Skeleton
skeleton.text: If Skeleton has at least {force:5}, remove {key:fragile}.

skeletonKey.name: Skeleton Key
skeletonKey.text: {trigger:cast} Sacrifice an active card you control: draw cards equal to its {force:?} (max 3).

slumberingTitan.name: Slumbering Titan
slumberingTitan.text: {trigger:enter} Add 2 stun counters to Slumbering Titan.

smokeBeetle.name: Smoke Beetle
smokeBeetle.text: If Smoke Beetle enters your discard, you may recycle your deck.

soulBaron.name: Soul Baron
soulBaron.text: {trigger:perish} Add attached cards to your hand.

soulLantern.name: Soul Lantern
soulLantern.text:
Whenever a non-token unit perishes, add a soul counter and attach the top card of your deck to Soul Lantern.
{trigger:perish} Add attached cards to your hand.

soulStone.name: Soul Stone
soulStone.text: Whenever a card is cast, Soul Stone gains {force:1}.

specterCube.name: Specter Cube
specterCube.text: Other units you control in the same row as Specter Cube have +{force:?} equal to Specter Cube's {force:?}.

spiritualWarlord.name: Spiritual Warlord
spiritualWarlord.text: {trigger:victor} Create a Bead {force:1}/{key:fragile} token with "{trigger:perish} A Ghost card you control gains {force:1}". You may move Spiritual Warlord to an open zone on your grid. If you do, Spiritual Warlord remains active.

spookedGolem.name: Spooked Golem
spookedGolem.text:
{trigger:enter} Shuffle a unit your opponent controls into their deck.
{trigger:end} Shuffle Spooked Golem into your deck.

starShower.name: Star Shower
starShower.text: {trigger:cast} Choose up to 3 open zones on either side of the grid. Create a Celestial {force:2} token in each, then sacrifice them until 1 remains.

sunBox.name: Sun Box
sunBox.text: When a card enters your void, deal 1 damage to a target card each opponent controls. If you have at least 3 cards in your void, damage all cards your opponents control instead.

swarm.name: Swarm
swarm.text: {trigger:cast} Return up to 3 units from your discard pile to your hand. You cannot play them this turn.

temporaryRelief.name: Temporary Relief
temporaryRelief.text: If a card you control were to take sick damage, that card instead gains {force:1}.

theCure?.name: The Cure?
theCure?.text: {trigger:cast} Choose a player. Cards that player controls gain {key:sick}.

theMoon.name: The Moon
theMoon.text: {cost:As an additional cost, sacrifice a card you control.}

theSeal.name: The Seal
theSeal.text: {cost:Must be played in the front row.} Other Back row cards you control cannot take damage.

tightSpot.name: Tight Spot
tightSpot.text: When an opponent moves a card, that card takes 1 damage.

tombCrawler.name: Tomb Crawler
tombCrawler.text: {trigger:victor} Discard a card from your hand. If you do, draw a card.

trickyOrb.name: Tricky Orb
trickyOrb.text: Whenever Tricky Orb moves, deal 1 damage to a back row card an opponent controls.

tunnelOfWhiteWind.name: Tunnel of White Wind
tunnelOfWhiteWind.text: Whenever a unit an opponent controls perishes, Tunel of White Wind gains 1 LVL.

twistedGolem.name: Twisted Golem
twistedGolem.text: {trigger:perish} You gain LVL equal to this card's LVL.

unstasis.name: Unstasis
unstasis.text: The effects of {key:static} are nullified for the effected card.

vintageVessel.name: Vintage Vessel
vintageVessel.text: When an opposing unit perishes, add a soul counter to Vintage Vessel and then you may create a clone of it as a Memory {force:1} token with all of its text.

voidCrawler.name: Void Crawler
voidCrawler.text: When Void Crawler enters your discard, you may use {skill:void talk}. For each card voided: deal 1 damage to target card your opponent controls.

voidPointer.name: Void Pointer
voidPointer.text: {trigger:enter} Void 3 cards from the top of your deck.

voidWorld.name: Void World
voidWorld.text: {cost:sacrifice 3 cards you control.} Center zone cards you control have +{force:3} and {key:immortal}.

warOnPluto.name: War on Pluto
warOnPluto.text: {trigger:begin} All Units attack if able. This does not cause them to become inactive, and does not count as them attacking.

wetaphemesis.name: Wetaphemesis
wetaphemesis.text: Gain {force:2} when a Bug enters your discard.

womanFromVenus.name: Woman from Venus
womanFromVenus.text: Woman From Venus has {key:Quick} when attacking. If Woman From Venus were to enter your void, you may set it instead as {force:3}.

wormWood.name: Worm Wood
wormWood.text: {trigger:cast} Back row cards opponents control gain {key:sick} and take an instance of {key:sick} damage. Draw a card for any cards that perished this way.

abstraction.name: Abstraction
abstraction.text: Copy your next spell cast, then return this card to your hand.

ashShower.name: Ash Shower
ashShower.text: Create a {force:0} clone of Ash Moth in the same row as this card.

beckoning.name: Beckoning
beckoning.text: Return Coming of Marlita from your discard pile to your hand: return Marlita Gray to your hand.

blender.name: Blender
blender.text: Remove a matter counter: deal 1 damage to a target front row card.

blindingLight.name: Blinding Light
blindingLight.text: Target card cannot deal combat damage until the end of the turn.

blueGiant.name: Blue Giant
blueGiant.text: Search your deck for a Celestial or God. Reveal it, then add it to your hand.

chaoticBrew.name: Chaotic Brew
chaoticBrew.text: Shuffle your discard pile and swap it with your deck, then add 2 cards from your discard to your hand. This change does not count as adding cards to your discard pile.

cloneTrick.name: Clone Trick
cloneTrick.text: Clone this card. Clones do not have Clone Trick.

cobbler.name: Cobbler
cobbler.text: Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. Reveal, then add any golem cards found to your hand. Send remaining cards to the top or bottom of your deck in any order.

congeal.name: Congeal
congeal.text: Other Monster cards you control gain {force:2} until the end of the turn.

contagious.name: Contagious
contagious.text: Cure a card you control: give {key:sick} to another card in play. Cannot target the same card twice in one turn.

crowMedicine.name: Crow Medicine
crowMedicine.text: Add a unit from your discard pile to your hand. It cannot be played this turn.

deathMagic.name: Death Magic
deathMagic.text: Shuffle your discard pile and look at the top 3 cards. If at least 1 spell is within the 3 cards, add 1 to your hand and sacrifice Ghost Spellcaster.

dig.name: Dig
dig.text: Search your deck for a Bug and send it to your discard pile or sacrifice Grub.

downpour.name: downpour
downpour.text: Discard 2 cards from your hand: deal damage to a front row card in play equal to the lowest LVL of the cards discarded.

drop.name: Drop
drop.text: Move Tonne to an open front row zone on an opponent's grid, and remove this skill.

emptiness.name: Emptiness
emptiness.text: Deal 5 damage to all units your opponent controls.

evaporate.name: Evaporate
evaporate.text: Destroy the opposing front row card. Effected card takes 2 damage.

evilGrin.name: Evil Grin
evilGrin.text: Choose a card type (cannot chose token). Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard a card of the chosen type or your deck runs out of cards. Add the card of the chosen type to your hand.

exoburial.name: Exoburial
exoburial.text: Return a Bug from your discard to your hand.

fadingWithTime.name: Fading with time
fadingWithTime.text: Search your deck for a card and reveal it. Shuffle your deck, then place the card on top of your deck.

feedTheMaw.name: Feed The Maw
feedTheMaw.text: Sacrifice a card you control: gain {force:3}.

flock.name: Flock
flock.text: Search your deck for a Crow. Reveal it, then add it to your hand.

fool'sGold.name: Fool's gold
fool'sGold.text: Lose {force:1}: Sacrifice an active unit you control. Add a soul counter to Soul Oven.

foolishMockery.name: Foolish Mockery
foolishMockery.text: Return a spell that was placed in your discard this turn to your hand. You cannot play that spell this turn.

friendship.name: Friendship
friendship.text: Target unit gains {force:?} equal to Lonely Drone's {force:?}.

grandJourney.name: Grand Journey
grandJourney.text: Set a unit from your deck except it is LVL 1.

gust.name: Gust
gust.text: Gain an extra movement phase this turn.

heatDeath.name: Heat Death
heatDeath.text: Void as many spells in your discard as you want. For every spell voided this way, deal 1 damage to each opponent.

ignite.name: Ignite
ignite.text: Attach the top 2 cards of your deck and add 2 soul counters to Soul Baron. If Soul Lantern is attached, set it instead.

magicLink.name: Magic Link
magicLink.text: Search your deck for a card with {skill:Magic Link} and reveal it, or set a card from your hand with {skill:Magic Link}.

magician.name: Magician
magician.text: Create a Magic {force:?} token with {force:?} equal to the number of spells in your discard. If the token has more than {force:3}, it is {key:delayed}.

marletion.name: marletion
marletion.text: Return all Marlita cards from your discard to your hand.

massAbsorption.name: Mass Absorption
massAbsorption.text: Void a card you control: gain {force:?} equal to the {force:?} of the voided card.

metamorphosis.name: Metamorphosis
metamorphosis.text: Attach up to 3 units from your discard to Chrysalis.

mighty.name: Mighty
mighty.text: Add {force:2} to another unit you control.

newPart.name: New Part
newPart.text: Create a Mold {force:1} token, then attach a unit from your hand to it. Mold gains the text of the attached unit (the attached unit goes to the discard when Mold perishes).

outburst.name: outburst
outburst.text: Deal 2 damage to a front row card.

peer.name: peer
peer.text: Reveal the top card of your deck. If the card's LVL is greater or equal to your current LVL, you may set it. Otherwise, void it or send it to the bottom of your deck.

piercingLight.name: Piercing Light
piercingLight.text: Remove all soul counters from cards you control: deal damage equal to the number of soul counters removed to all opposing cards.

ponder.name: ponder
ponder.text: Draw 2 cards: discard a card from your hand.

ratRitual.name: Rat Ritual
ratRitual.text: Sacrifice all Rat tokens in play: deal 1 damage to an opponent for each Rat sacrificed.

readyForDoom.name: ready for doom
readyForDoom.text: Add 2 nuclear counters to Doomsday Barrel.

redDwarf.name: Red Dwarf
redDwarf.text: Add a Celestial or God from your discard to your hand.

rediscover.name: Rediscover
rediscover.text: Shuffle your discard: add the top card of your discard pile to your hand.

reelIn.name: Reel in
reelIn.text: {key:instant} Lose {force:1}: Create a Fish {force:0}/{key: static, sealed} token.

repurpose.name: repurpose
repurpose.text: Sacrifice a card you control: search your deck for a Golem or Structure. Reveal it, then add it to your hand.

reunion.name: Reunion
reunion.text: For every other card named Nyx you control, sacrifice them and add their {force:?} and attached cards to this one.

selfSearch.name: Self Search
selfSearch.text: Search your deck for a card with LVL equal to the amount of soul counters on Arbiter. Reveal it, then add it to your hand.

seperation.name: Seperation
seperation.text: You may remove up to {force:3} from Deconstructor and give it to another card you control.

sickening.name: sickening
sickening.text: {key:sick} cards your opponent controls take an instance of sick damage.

skinner.name: Skinner
skinner.text: Sacrifice a card you control: gain {force:2}.

smile.name: smile
smile.text: If Madness Policy has a soul counter, draw a card.

snuff.name: snuff
snuff.text: Destroy any number of sick cards in play.

somethingNew.name: Something New
somethingNew.text: Sacrifice a card you control: set the top card of your deck.

spawn.name: spawn
spawn.text: Sacrifice all Ghost tokens in play: create a Ghost {force:?}/{key:bleed} token with {force:?} equal to the number of cards sacrificed.

sucker.name: Sucker
sucker.text: Sap Spider swaps {force:?} with target unit your opponent controls.

sumOfGod.name: Sum of God
sumOfGod.text: Sacrifice all units you control. Gain 2x{force:?} of the units sacrificed. Mineral God is {key:muted} until the end of the turn.

surge.name: Surge
surge.text: Remove a matter counter: Gain {force:1} or deal 1 damage to a target card.

surgery.name: Surgery
surgery.text: Cure a card: target unit you control gains {force:3}.

surprise!.name: Surprise!
surprise!.text: Discard up to 2 cards: attach units from your deck equal to the number of cards discarded to Jack in the Box.

suspension.name: suspension
suspension.text: Discard a card from your hand: draw a card.

toTheBottom.name: To The Bottom
toTheBottom.text: Discard the top card of your deck. If the card discarded is an Icon, become inactive then set it if able.

truthOfTheMoon.name: Truth of The Moon
truthOfTheMoon.text: Cards you control gain {key:immortal} until the start of your next turn.

undbind.name: undbind
undbind.text: Discard 3 cards from the top of your deck. Remain active if your deck is empty after discarding cards.

upside.name: upside
upside.text: If a card you control has {key:doom}, draw a card.

voidPrayer.name: Void Prayer
voidPrayer.text: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Add 2 to your hand, void the rest.

voidTalk.name: void talk
voidTalk.text: Void up to 1 card from your deck and up to 1 card from your hand.

voider.name: Voider
voider.text: Void a card from your hand.

warCry.name: War Cry
warCry.text: Bugs you control gain {key:quick} until the end of the turn.

welcomeHome.name: Welcome Home
welcomeHome.text: Sacrifice Home of Marlita: Recycle your deck, then search your deck for a Marlita Card.

zombify.name: Zombify
zombify.text: Sacrifice a unit you control: return another unit from your discard pile to your hand.
